prompt: Patient with a 4-week productive cough and mild left-side pleuritic pain. Afebrile. Exam unremarkable. Want to rule out early infiltrate. Please get a chest X-ray within 48 hours and call the office with results.
reference_response:
Hi,

Following your visit, your doctor has requested a chest X-ray within 48 hours. Please arrange this as soon as possible and call the office once it is done.

Take care,
Your Care Team
